'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/UKThreatLevel\/UKThreatLevel.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=nxyAeHgOIrpKx69EXPoS15nwPrr.NwwaCBn3w_Hwhu8-1772636762-1.0.1.1-IYxh0qHDx.IY9IR5t_Cvrs1VDAItq3RusZc2szBsf2U"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
